title: FIXTURE — names an external standard but drops its provenance (MUST be rejected by the authority gate)
gap: fixture only — a PD that grounds a design claim in LangGraph human-in-the-loop but records no structured authority, so where/why/how the standard was used would be lost to chat.
pattern: A design decision cites an authoritative standard (LangGraph) in prose, but the authority array holds only a flat string — the URL, access date, and grounds are never committed.
